name: vibeguard
description: The whole vibeguard loop, self-contained: 9 engineering rules every AI agent must follow, the gates that verify them, live drift enforcement (the session scopes itself and the agent is blocked when it breaks a green check), and a workflow toolbox (grill me, write a PRD, to issues, TDD, diagnose, caveman). No npm install, no build — bundled binaries run from the plugin.
